description: All-wells option and wells for the selected fleet and pad.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT '__ALL__' AS value, 'All wells' AS label, 0 AS sort_order
UNION ALL
SELECT name AS value, name AS label, 1 AS sort_order
FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1
WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name
ORDER BY sort_order, label
) q
